name: TP53 RAG Platform — Full Analysis Workflow
description: Automated TP53 multi-omics analysis pipeline integrated with the RAG multi-agent platform. Triggers on new accession input, runs the bioinformatics pipeline, dispatches to all RAG agents, and delivers a comprehensive HIPAA-compliant report with EHR alerting.

nodes.name: Trigger: New Accession Input
nodes.notes: Receives: { accession, patient_id, email, clinician_id, urgency, cancer_type, institution }

nodes.name: Validate & Sanitise Input
nodes.notes: Validates accession format, hashes PII (HIPAA), sanitises all inputs

nodes.name: Health Check: RAG Platform
nodes.notes: Verify RAG platform API is running before dispatching

nodes.name: Run TP53 Pipeline
nodes.notes: Runs the TP53 bioinformatics pipeline. Adjust path as needed.

nodes.name: RAG: Full Multi-Agent Analysis
nodes.notes: Dispatches to all 6 RAG agents. 5-min timeout for full multi-agent run. Retries twice on failure.

nodes.name: Score Risk & Triage
nodes.notes: Scores clinical risk 0-100, assigns triage tier, identifies actionable therapeutic targets

nodes.name: EHR Alert: Critical Finding Notifier
nodes.notes: Generates HL7 FHIR R4 Bundle (ClinicalImpression + Flag + DiagnosticReport), routes smart notifications by triage tier (CRITICAL→SMS+pager, HIGH→email+slack, MODERATE→email, LOW→email), Kenya clinical context enrichment, HIPAA audit trail

nodes.name: Send EHR FHIR to Hospital System
nodes.notes: Posts HL7 FHIR R4 Bundle to hospital EHR system (OpenMRS / DHIS2 / custom FHIR server)

nodes.name: Send Clinician Email
nodes.notes: Sends full report + FHIR bundle to requesting clinician

nodes.name: Save Audit Log
nodes.notes: Append-only HIPAA audit trail — never deleted

nodes.name: Save Full Report
nodes.notes: Saves full clinical report with unique alert ID

nodes.name: Error: Platform Not Ready
nodes.notes: Handles platform-offline scenario: generates fallback alert with manual database links, logs HIPAA audit event, provides retry instructions

main.node: Send EHR FHIR to Hospital System
